wine_restaurants.name: The Yeatman Restaurant
wine_restaurants.address: Rua do Choupelo (Santa Marinha), 345, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Contemporary Portuguese tasting menus built to showcase the country's wine regions, with extensive pairing flights from the in-house cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Porto's only two-Michelin-star table, inside The Yeatman wine hotel above Gaia. Tasting menus are engineered around a 25,000-bottle Portuguese-led cellar with pairing flights.

verified.address_quoted: Rua do Choupelo (Santa Marinha), 345, 4400-088 Vila Nova de Gaia

wine_restaurants.name: DOC
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Chef Rui Paula's contemporary Douro cooking across a la carte and three tasting menus, with a riverside terrace and a cellar deep in Douro and Port
wine_restaurants.description: Rui Paula's glass-and-water pavilion on the Douro at Folgosa, with an extensive Douro-and-Port cellar, three tasting menus and a vegetarian section beside the river.

wine_restaurants.name: Castas e Pratos
wine_restaurants.address: Rua José Vasques Osório, 5050-280 Peso da Régua, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Douro gastronomy in a restored railway warehouse, with a high-ceilinged dining room above a cellar of more than 600 references
wine_restaurants.description: Set in a former rail warehouse in Régua, Castas e Pratos pairs modern Douro cooking with a cellar of over 600 wines weighted to Douro and Port.

verified.address_quoted: Rua José Vasques Osório, 5050-280 Peso da Régua

wine_restaurants.name: Antiqvvm
wine_restaurants.address: Rua de Entre Quintas 220, 4050-240 Porto, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Chef Vítor Matos's contemporary fine dining in the former Solar do Vinho do Porto, with a sommelier-led, mostly Portuguese pairing programme
wine_restaurants.description: A two-Michelin-star table by Vítor Matos in the former Solar do Vinho do Porto at Massarelos, with garden views over the Douro and a curated Portuguese pairing list.

wine_restaurants.name: Conceitus Winery Restaurant
wine_restaurants.address: Quinta Nova de Nossa Senhora do Carmo, Covas do Douro, 5085-222 Sabrosa, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Seasonal Douro cooking designed to push the estate's wines forward, with table tastings, cellar bottles and by-the-glass pours of Quinta Nova wines
wine_restaurants.description: The first winery restaurant in the Douro, at Quinta Nova above Pinhão. The kitchen builds seasonal dishes around the estate's own wines, with cellar bottles and flights.

wine_restaurants.name: Bomfim 1896
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Wood-fired regional Douro cooking inspired by family kitchens, with around 300 labels spanning Symington and Portuguese and international producers
wine_restaurants.description: The riverside restaurant at Dow's Quinta do Bomfim in Pinhão, centred on wood-fired regional cooking and a 300-label list mixing Symington wines with wider selections.

wine_restaurants.name: Seixo by Vasco Coelho Santos
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Chef Vasco Coelho Santos's contemporary Douro menu at Sandeman's Quinta do Seixo, built for pairing with the estate's Ports and Douro wines
wine_restaurants.description: The panoramic restaurant at Sandeman's Quinta do Seixo above Valença do Douro, where Vasco Coelho Santos cooks a contemporary Douro menu paired to the estate's wines.

wine_restaurants.name: Cozinha da Clara
wine_restaurants.address: Quinta de la Rosa, 5085-215 Pinhão, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Seasonal Douro cooking on the riverbank at Quinta de la Rosa, built around the estate's own Douro wines and Ports

awards.source: Quinta de la Rosa wine-tourism programme

wine_restaurants.description: The riverside restaurant at the Bergqvist family's Quinta de la Rosa near Pinhão, pairing seasonal Douro dishes with the estate's own wines and Ports.

wine_restaurants.name: Cozinha do Douro
wine_restaurants.address: Quinta de Vale Abraão, Samodães, 5100-758 Lamego, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Northern Portuguese seasonal cooking at the Six Senses estate, with a wine-library cellar of Douro and Portuguese references for pairing
wine_restaurants.description: The estate restaurant at Six Senses Douro Valley near Lamego, serving northern Portuguese seasonal dishes alongside a wine-library cellar weighted to the Douro.

verified.address_quoted: Quinta de Vale Abraão, Samodães 5100-758 Lamego

wine_restaurants.name: Terraçu's
wine_restaurants.address: Quinta Nova de Nossa Senhora do Carmo, Covas do Douro, 5085-222 Sabrosa, Portugal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Casual terrace dining at Quinta Nova with light Douro plates and by-the-glass pours of the estate wines overlooking the vineyards
wine_restaurants.description: The vineyard terrace restaurant at Quinta Nova above Pinhão, serving light Douro plates and estate wines by the glass with sweeping views over the hilltop vines.
